response.justification: While Bogdan is clearly an excellent software engineer with strong fundamentals and 16+ years of professional experience, he does not meet the mandatory technical requirements for this role. Most critically, his C++ experience is limited to approximately 2 years (2014-2015) and is severely outdated, falling far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development. Additionally, there is no evidence of Windows platform expertise, SQL Server/Oracle proficiency, or any fixed income/capital markets domain knowledge. His career trajectory over the past decade has moved away from systems programming toward web, mobile, and full-stack development, making a return to specialized financial C++ systems a significant mismatch.
strengths: Proven track record building high-quality systems across multiple technical domains with 16+ years of professional experience
Strong CI/CD and infrastructure expertise with hands-on DevOps experience setting up GitLab, CI servers, and containerized deployments
Excellent communication and mentoring abilities demonstrated through multiple workshops, talks, and teaching experience
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~2 years from 2014-2015) and severely outdated, falling well short of the mandatory 5-10 year requirement
No demonstrated Windows platform development or capital markets/fixed income domain expertise required for the role
Career trajectory over the past decade shows consistent movement away from systems programming toward web and full-stack technologies
